response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements achieved during the game's redevelopment. With the addition of optimization features, the frame rate has been nearly doubled. However, the integration of new hardware-intensive features, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces performance challenges. We aim to maintain a balance between these elements.  

Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the updated game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that dictates how much "body fluid" they can absorb through their womb, stomach, and bowels. For example, Dr. Anya can accommodate 4000ml of sperm without overflow, whereas Alet can only take 2800ml. Male test subjects release varying amounts of fluid during climax: a Dreamer expels approximately 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing transfers 400-600ml into their partner.  

Picture #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice visual effects. These fluid effects are not pre-designed for sex scenes and instead trigger dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy levels, and stamina. Certain character abilities, obtained through testing with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or significant squirting.  

Picture #4 and #5 depict dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR. The hands are controlled via a VR controller.  

Pictures #6, #7, and #8 preview upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released in the coming months.  

The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
